changes.comment: Add Result<T>.shouldNotFail(label?, frameDepth?) for declaration-time invariants. Returns the value on success; on failure throws an Error composed from the original message and the captured call site (V8 Error.captureStackTrace with a WebKit stack-parsing fallback). Replaces the .orThrow() + .withErrorFormat() boilerplate at module-level const declarations, static initializers, and test fixtures.
